articles.title: ‘Jackass: Best and Last’: The stunt-comedy daredevils finally call it a day
articles.description: Let me just start this off by saying what a wonderful pop culture piece to write about, even if it is a bit surreal to think that over two decades have passed since a group of self-described “idiots” first exploded onto our television screens via MTV! I never imagined that twenty-six years later, I would still be sitting down to discuss the monumental impact of Johnny Knoxville and his merry band of miscreants. Yet here we are! The truth is, when they first burst into the cultural consciousness, they didn’t just give us a new form of reality television; they [...]... articles.title: Country diary: Welcome to the hill where anything, it seems, can happen | Amy-Jane Beer
articles.description: Hood Hill, North Yorkshire: From Satanic slip-ups to postwar plane crashes, stories have accumulated on this summit, just one part of an already rich landscape There’s something special about Hood Hill, I tell my son Lochy as we begin climbing. It’s not just the pleasing symmetry, pointy summit and epic view. Not just that it has intriguing medieval earthworks and weird erratic boulders dumped long ago by wandering glaciers. It’s more that this hill, and the moor-edge landscape it is part of – including Whitestone Cliff, Lake Gormire , Roulston Scar, various caves, a gap known as the Devil’s Stride and the more recent Kilburn White Horse – seem to spawn stories. We’ve come today on the trail of one recorded by the folklorist Thomas Gill in 1852. Continue reading...

articles.title: How to get the Jotunn Star Wonder Weapon in Black Ops 7 Zombies Totenreich
articles.description: The arrival of Totenreich to Black Ops 7 Zombies brings a host of new challenges for us, and having the Jotunn Star will make things slightly easier to manage. It's a brand new Wonder Weapon that can be found on the map itself, and it's perfect to effortlessly clear waves of undead. So first, let's find out how you can obtain it. How to get the Jotunn Star in Black Ops 7 Zombies The key to obtaining the new Wonder Weapon is locked behind the shrine at Burial Grounds. However, the door to the shrine will be locked. To unlock the door, you'll need the Chain Links quest item. This is a necessary step, and you can find the Chain Links on the front tip of the big boat (refer to the image below) at Dry Dock. Screenshot by Destructoid How do you get the Chain Links? For starters, I didn't find a way to get on the boat, which would have made things comfortable. However, you'll find a pair of buttons in a room to the left of the stationary boat. Press the button, and it will activate a nearby crane that moves down a container. You have to quickly jump on the container and do a second jump (wall jump, to be precise) to the tip of the boat. While you'll likely fall, you'll have obtained the Chain Links. You'll also need two other items apart from the Chain Links. Screenshot by Destructoid Lantern: You'll need to survive until wave 10, when you'll encounter a special round. Defeat all the enemies and survive Wave 10, and you'll find the Lantern as a guaranteed drop. Chili Chunks: You can find the item behind a truck located just beside the Deadshot Daiquiri machine on Storm Bridge. Screenshot by Destructoid Once you've all three items, head to the basement of the room in Burial Grounds that you opened with Chain Links. Place the Lantern on the tomb in the middle, and it will trigger a lockdown. Clear all the zombies first; then, interact with the constellation symbols on the walls. Using the opening door of the shrine as the reference, the correct order is Left, Right, Back, and Front . Screenshot by Destructoid If you manage to complete this step correctly, the ghost of Astrid will appear. Your next task is to follow the spectre all the way to the Lighthouse. If it stops, you'll need to kill zombies near it to feed their souls. Once replenished, the ghost of Astrid will start to move automatically. Take the zipline and go to the Lighthouse. Once the ghost of Astrid arrives over there, it will create platforms for you to climb on. Use the platforms to reach the Lighthouse, and enter from a broken entrance on one side. Image via Activision Head inside, and use the stairs to climb up. You'll need to use the platforms and the stairs to reach all the way to the top. The Jotunn Star will wait for you at the top, and you can upgrade the Wonder Weapon using a Pack-A-Punch. The post How to get the Jotunn Star Wonder Weapon in Black Ops 7 Zombies Totenreich appeared first on Destructoid .

articles.title: Marvel Rivals’ special Avengers mode is lazy, unbalanced, and just not very fun to play
articles.description: I was pretty excited to play the new MCU Avengers -themed mode in Marvel Rivals to celebrate the movie's 14th anniversary, but after just a couple of games, I'm completely done with it. NetEase Games advertised the new Path to Doomsday: The Avengers mode in Marvel Rivals as an asymmetric PvP experience honoring the 2012 Avengers movie, and I suppose they weren't lying. But as far as any other redeeming qualities, it has missed the bar completely. Screenshot by Destructoid The mode features one team of the original MCU Avengers (pictured above) versus one player as an utterly overpowered, ridiculously strong version of Loki. RIDICULOUSLY strong. His ability set makes it a fight against six other players, but it doesn't feel very fair if you're on the Avengers thanks to Loki's outrageous ability set. Loki can spawn clones of himself and go invisible like usual, but now he deals incredibly high damage with his attacks, and he's also got a mind control ability that allows him to take control over any Avenger and fight against their teammates or, as shown in this video from streamer Necros , jump off the map completely. It's beyond broken, especially considering the Avengers have no healer and can only regain HP from health packs around the maps. What's worse, though, is that the rest of the mode feels lazily thrown together. It's played on a variety of Domination maps that have absolutely nothing to do with the Avengers movie at all, so it doesn't feel like there was much extra thought put into it beyond making it Avengers vs. Loki, and it's just a massive disappointment. I'm sure NetEase will make some balancing to Loki in the coming days because feedback is overwhelmingly negative about how strong the character is, but the playerbase's perception of the mode so far is not very good, to say the least. The best part about the mode is that, every time you respawn after being merked by Loki yet again, you hear the classic Avengers movies' theme song. But that's about where my enjoyment ended after five consecutive matches of getting utterly destroyed by Loki. Path to Doomsday will add more content down the line this year including additions honoring Avengers: Age of Ultron, Avengers: Infinity War, and Avengers: Endgame , leading up to Avengers: Doomsday's release in December. I sincerely hope the future content drops will be better than this one is on day one, because as cool as this idea may have sounded in theory, the execution was a complete miss. The post Marvel Rivals’ special Avengers mode is lazy, unbalanced, and just not very fun to play appeared first on Destructoid .

articles.title: Trump Rages at Kimmel After Star Poked Fun at Marriage to Melania
articles.description: Evan Vucci / REUTERS Donald Trump has launched a bitter attack against Jimmy Kimmel amid the late-night host’s attacks against the president. In a Truth Social post, the 79-year-old president demanded that the Jimmy Kimmel Live! host be fired after he doubled down on his jokes about Trump’s marriage to the first lady, Melania Trump. “When is ABC Fake News Network firing seriously unfunny Jimmy Kimmel, who incompetently presides over one of the Lowest Rated shows on Television? People are angry. It better be soon!!!” Trump wrote. Read more at The Daily Beast.

articles.title: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil Trailer Mimics The Games In A Way The Previous Movies Never Did
Impatient Trump issues new demand to fire comedian he hates: 'Better be soon!'
articles.description: President Donald Trump signaled his impatience with ABC over his long-simmering feud with late-night talk show host Jimmy Kimmel. The 79-year-old president demanded the network remove Kimmel from the airwaves over a joke he made last week in which he described first lady Melania Trump as having "the glow of an expectant widow," and his Federal Communications Commission chairman Brendan Carr has directed Walt Disney Co. to file early license renewal applications for its local affiliate stations. "When is ABC Fake News Network firing seriously unfunny Jimmy Kimmel, who incompetently presides over one of the Lowest Rated shows on Television?" Trump posted Thursday morning on Truth Social. "People are angry. It better be soon!!! President DJT." Both the president and his wife have publicly called on ABC to fire Kimmel over his April 23 joke, which they have blamed for an alleged assassination attempt two days later at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. ABC briefly suspended Kimmel in September following backlash over his comments about the suspect accused of assassinating conservative activist Charlie Kirk in Utah.
